title: duvaua dependens var. subintegra
intro: Duvaua dependens var. subintegra, also known as Himalayan or Indian penhygreum, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Duvaua dependens var. subintegra include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. Herbal preparations of Duvaua dependens var. subintegra include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be made by steeping the leaves and stems in hot water to harness its medicinal properties.
